happy.translate: счастливый, довольный, веселый, благополучный, удачный, навеселе, подходящий

examples.eng: I'm very happy for you.
Happy birthday!
The story has a happy ending.
Happy landing!
I'd be more than happy to help.
You don't look very happy today.
I account myself happy.
I am happy in my work / job.
He whistled a happy tune.
He was happy to get the win.
examples.ru: Он был счастлив одержать эту победу.

examples.eng: She was a very happy child.
I'm quite happy living alone.
I've never felt happier in my life.
examples.ru: Никогда в жизни я не был так счастлив.

examples.eng: By all accounts they were a happy couple.
examples.ru: Судя по всему, они были счастливой парой.

examples.eng: Happy landings!
We were happy then.
She has a happy home life.
Here's to the happy couple.
He enjoyed his happy, bucolic isolation.
examples.ru: Он наслаждался своим счастливым сельским уединением.

examples.eng: We wish you a long and happy retirement.
examples.ru: Мы желаем вам долгих и счастливых лет жизни на пенсии.

examples.eng: Happy New Year!
Happy Birthday, Michael!
Companion of my happy then!
Jean seems blissfully happy.
Happy Thanksgiving, everyone!
I had a very happy childhood.
examples.ru: У меня было очень счастливое детство.

examples.eng: The happy dog wagged his tail.
He looked content, even happy.
examples.ru: Он выглядел довольным, и даже счастливым.

examples.eng: He lived a long and happy life.
examples.ru: Он прожил долгую и счастливую жизнь.

examples.eng: Days of happy commune are dead.
